name: Lemon Barbecued Chicken
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together catsup, lemonade, water, Worcestershire sauce, mustard, corn oil, and onion.
2. Simmer uncovered for 5 minutes.
3. Place chicken over hot coals on grill, skin side up, about 8 inches from the heat.
4. Cook, basting frequently and turning several times, about 25-30 minutes, or until fork can be inserted in the chicken with ease.
